tasks.title: Implement Task Data Structure and Storage
tasks.description: Create the core task data model and JSON file structure that will serve as the single source of truth for the system.
tasks.details: Implement the tasks.json file structure according to the Tasks Collection Model in the PRD. Create utility functions for reading and writing to this file. Implement validation for the task model to ensure data integrity. The task model should include id, title, description, status, dependencies, priority, details, testStrategy, and subtasks fields as specified in the PRD. Ensure proper error handling for file operations and data validation. Create a basic initialization function that creates an empty tasks.json file with the correct structure if one doesn't exist.
tasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests to verify the task model validation works correctly. Test file operations with mock file system. Verify the structure matches the specification in the PRD. Test error handling for invalid data and file operation failures.

tasks.title: Develop Command Line Interface Foundation
tasks.description: Create the command-line interface that will be the primary way users interact with the system.
tasks.details: Use Commander.js to implement the command parsing system. Create the main CLI entry point in scripts/dev.js. Implement global options as specified in the PRD (--help, --version, --file, --quiet, --debug, --json). Set up colorized console output for better user experience. Implement a logging system with configurable levels. Create help documentation for commands. Establish the command structure pattern that will be used throughout the application. Implement basic error handling and user feedback mechanisms.
tasks.testStrategy: Test command parsing with various inputs. Verify help documentation is generated correctly. Test logging at different verbosity levels. Ensure error messages are clear and helpful. Test with invalid commands to verify error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Basic Task Operations
tasks.description: Create the fundamental CRUD operations for task management through the CLI.
tasks.details: Implement commands for creating, reading, updating, and deleting tasks. Create 'list' command to display tasks with filtering options. Implement 'status' command to update task status (pending/done/deferred). Add 'add' command to create new tasks manually. Implement 'update' command to modify existing tasks. Create 'delete' command to remove tasks. Implement dependency tracking to prevent circular dependencies and ensure logical task ordering. Add priority management with validation for high/medium/low values. Ensure all commands properly update the tasks.json file.
tasks.testStrategy: Test each command with various inputs. Verify tasks.json is updated correctly after each operation. Test dependency validation to ensure no circular dependencies are created. Test priority validation. Verify list filtering works correctly. Test error cases like updating non-existent tasks.

tasks.title: Develop Task File Generation System
tasks.description: Create the system for generating individual task files from the tasks.json data and maintaining synchronization.
tasks.details: Implement the task file generation system that creates individual .txt files in the tasks/ directory based on the Task File Format specified in the PRD. Create utility functions to generate file names (task_001.txt format). Implement bi-directional synchronization to keep tasks.json and individual files in sync. Create commands to generate all task files or specific task files. Implement proper file organization and naming conventions. Add functionality to detect and resolve conflicts between tasks.json and individual files. Ensure subtasks are properly represented in the task files.
tasks.testStrategy: Test file generation with various task data. Verify file content matches the specified format. Test synchronization by modifying individual files and verifying tasks.json is updated. Test conflict resolution scenarios. Verify file naming follows the convention. Test with tasks containing subtasks.

tasks.title: Implement AI Client Architecture with Local LLM Support
tasks.description: Create a flexible AI client architecture that supports both cloud APIs (Anthropic, Perplexity) and local LLM implementations.
tasks.details: Design and implement a flexible AI client architecture that can connect to different AI providers. Create a base AI client class with common functionality. Implement specific client classes for Anthropic Claude, Perplexity, and local LLMs. Use OpenAI SDK for both Perplexity and local LLM connections. Support configurable base URLs for local LLM endpoints (e.g., http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama). Implement environment variable handling for API keys and configuration. Add validation for API configurations. Create a factory pattern for selecting the appropriate client based on configuration. Implement graceful fallback mechanisms between providers. Ensure consistent error handling across all providers.
tasks.testStrategy: Test connection to each supported AI provider. Verify configuration validation works correctly. Test fallback mechanisms when primary provider fails. Test with mock API responses. Verify error handling provides clear feedback. Test with various local LLM endpoints (Ollama, LocalAI).

tasks.title: Implement PRD Parsing System
tasks.description: Create the system for parsing Product Requirements Documents into structured task lists using AI.
tasks.details: Implement functionality to read PRD files from the file system. Create prompt templates for PRD parsing according to the AI Prompt Engineering Specifications in the PRD. Implement the PRD to task conversion logic using the AI client. Add intelligent dependency inference to automatically determine task relationships. Implement priority assignment logic based on task importance and dependencies. Create a command to generate tasks from a PRD file. Ensure the generated tasks follow the task model structure. Implement validation of AI-generated tasks before saving to tasks.json.
tasks.testStrategy: Test PRD parsing with sample PRD files. Verify generated tasks have appropriate dependencies and priorities. Test with different AI providers to ensure consistent results. Verify error handling for malformed PRD files or AI responses. Test validation of generated tasks.

tasks.title: Develop Task Expansion with AI
tasks.description: Implement functionality to expand tasks into more detailed subtasks using AI assistance.
tasks.details: Create subtask generation prompts according to the Task Expansion Prompt Structure in the PRD. Implement a workflow for expanding tasks into subtasks using AI. Add context-aware expansion capabilities that consider project state and related tasks. Implement parent-child relationship management for tasks and subtasks. Create commands for expanding individual tasks or multiple tasks. Ensure subtasks are properly stored in the task model and reflected in task files. Implement validation of AI-generated subtasks before saving.
tasks.testStrategy: Test subtask generation with various task types. Verify parent-child relationships are maintained correctly. Test context-aware expansion with different project states. Verify subtasks are properly stored and displayed. Test validation of generated subtasks.

tasks.title: Implement Implementation Drift Handling
tasks.description: Create functionality to update future tasks based on changes in implementation or context.
tasks.details: Implement capability to update future tasks based on changes in completed tasks. Create prompts for task rewriting based on new context. Implement dependency chain updates to maintain logical task ordering. Design a system to preserve completed work while updating future tasks. Create commands for updating future tasks based on implementation changes. Implement detection of implementation drift by comparing actual implementation with planned tasks. Add functionality to suggest task updates based on detected drift.
tasks.testStrategy: Test task updating with various implementation changes. Verify dependency chains are maintained after updates. Test preservation of completed work during updates. Verify drift detection correctly identifies changes. Test with complex task dependencies to ensure logical ordering is maintained.

tasks.title: Implement Batch Operations and Project Initialization
tasks.description: Create functionality for batch operations on multiple tasks and project initialization.
tasks.details: Implement multi-task status updates to change status of multiple tasks at once. Add bulk subtask generation for multiple parent tasks. Create task filtering and querying functionality based on various criteria (status, priority, dependencies). Implement advanced dependency management for complex task relationships. Create a project templating system for quick initialization. Implement interactive setup for new projects. Add environment configuration during project setup. Create documentation generation during project initialization. Implement commands for batch operations and project initialization.
tasks.testStrategy: Test batch operations with various task selections. Verify project initialization creates the correct directory structure and files. Test interactive setup with different inputs. Verify documentation generation produces correct output. Test batch operations with complex task dependencies.

tasks.title: Develop Cursor AI Integration and User Documentation
tasks.description: Create documentation and guidelines for Cursor AI integration and comprehensive user documentation.
tasks.details: Create dev_workflow.mdc documentation for Cursor AI. Implement cursor_rules.mdc according to specifications. Add self_improve.mdc for continuous improvement. Design rule integration documentation. Document task discovery workflow for agents. Create task selection guidelines for agents. Implement implementation guidance for agents. Add verification procedures for agents. Document command syntax for agents. Create example interactions for agents. Implement agent response patterns. Add context management for agents. Create detailed README for the project. Add scripts documentation. Implement example workflows. Create troubleshooting guides.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify documentation is clear and comprehensive. Test agent workflows with Cursor AI. Verify example interactions work as documented. Test troubleshooting guides against common issues. Get feedback from users on documentation clarity and completeness.
